frontier: Whether the GNFS constant-factor route has a concrete, safe reopening condition.
action: Ran one registered, read-only control-plane verifier against the prior certified checkpoint and current protected-state fingerprints.
verified: Six checks passed: prior-result integrity, prior certificate, zero prior reopening conditions, live queue status, next gate, and protected-store fingerprint agreement.
result: No evidenced reopening condition. GNFS work remains closed in unattended mode; rotated away without running a factorer or measurement.
next_gate: Explicit authorization or a concrete sealed-runner, manifest, planned-row, fixture, lineage, receipt, or fingerprint change; then prove sealed no-factorer nonemission before measurement.
